frame_eqs_str: a['basstime']=(a['basstime']+(0.003*a['bass'])); a['q1']=Math.sin(a['basstime']); a['q2']=(a['basstime']*0.001); a['vol']=pow((a['bass']*2), 2); a['basssum']=a['vol']; a['stickybit']=mod(a['time'],2); a['volavg']=(a['volavg']+(a['vol']*equal(a['stickybit'], 1))); a['sample1']=(a['sample1']+equal(a['stickybit'], 1)); a['volavg2']=(a['volavg2']+(a['vol']*equal(a['stickybit'], 0))); a['sample2']=(a['sample2']+equal(a['stickybit'], 0)); a['edge']=bnot(equal(a['bit2'], a['stickybit'])); a['volavg']=(a['volavg']-((a['volavg']*a['edge'])*a['stickybit'])); a['volavg2']=(a['volavg2']-((a['volavg2']*a['edge'])*equal(a['stickybit'], 0))); a['sample1']=(a['sample1']-((a['sample1']*a['edge'])*a['stickybit'])); a['sample2']=(a['sample2']-((a['sample2']*a['edge'])*equal(a['stickybit'], 0))); a['diff']=((Math.abs(equal(a['stickybit'], 1))>0.00001)?(div(a['basssum'],div(a['volavg2'],a['sample2']))):(0)); a['diff']=((Math.abs(equal(a['stickybit'], 0))>0.00001)?(div(a['basssum'],div(a['volavg'],a['sample1']))):(a['diff'])); a['diff']=((Math.abs(below(a['diff'], 0.1))>0.00001)?(0):(a['diff'])); a['bit2']=mod(a['time'],2); a['difftime']=((Math.abs(above(a['difftime'], 2000))>0.00001)?(0):(a['difftime'])); a['monitor']=a['diff']; a['q3']=above(a['diff'], 2); a['monitor']=a['diff'];
